title: At The Side Line Of Seplat Energy Plc AGM In Lagos
description: At the side line of Seplat Energy Plc 9th Annual General Meeting (AGM), for the financial year ended December 31, 2021, where Financial and Energy Journalist engaged outgoing Chairman of the board Dr
html: At the side line of Seplat Energy Plc 9th Annual General Meeting (AGM), for the financial year ended December 31, 2021, where Financial and Energy Journalist engaged outgoing Chairman of the board Dr ABC Orjiakor, Chief Executive Officer,  Roger Brown and Chief Financial Officer (CFO) Mr Emeka Onwuka, on the company performance during the year under review and the company future plans.
